channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 3 com severidade Crítica
• 13 com severidade Alta
• 13 novas CVEs
• 3 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2025-62623 - VMware
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A heap-based buffer overflow in the ionic cloud driver for VMware ESXi could allow an attacker to achieve privilege escalation, potentially resulting in arbitrary code execution.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-62623
 
🚨 CVE-2026-28376 - Grafana
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
The Grafana Live push endpoint can be exploited to cause unbounded memory allocation by sending a large or streaming request body, potentially leading to out-of-memory conditions. An authenticated user with access to the Grafana Live API can trigger this issue.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28376
 
🚨 CVE-2025-32425 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
AutoGPT is a platform that allows users to create, deploy, and manage continuous artificial intelligence agents that automate complex workflows. In AutoGPT, the execution process is recorded to the console (stdout/stderr), and deployed in container mode, which is automatically captured by Docker and stored as "container logs". However, prior to 0.6.32, there is no limit on the log size when the container is deployed.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-32425
 
🚨 CVE-2026-44218 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 3.0
Resumo:
ciguard is a static security auditor for CI/CD pipelines. From 0.1.0 to 0.8.1, the published ghcr.io/jo-jo98/ciguard container image inherits the default root user because the Dockerfile lacks a USER directive.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44218
 
📰 VMware vSAN Protection and Recovery Enhancements for VCF 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a ESX no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/14/vmware-vsan-protection-and-recovery-enhancements-for-vcf-9-1/
 
📰 Deliver Production SQL Server DBaaS with VMware Data Services Manager 9.1
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
VMware Data Services Manager (DSM) 9.1 delivers a significant milestone: Microsoft SQL Server is now fully supported on the platform. First shipped as a Technical Preview in DSM 9.0, SQL Server joins Postgres and MySQL as a production-ready database engine in the VMware portfolio’s database-as-a-service solution for VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) private clouds.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/05/14/deliver-production-sql-server-dbaas-with-vmware-data-services-manager-9-1/
 
📰 Critical 18-Year-Old NGINX Vulnerability Enables Remote Code Execution Attacks - CyberSecurityNews
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Nginx, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 18-year-old NGINX vulnerability allows DoS, potential RCE - BleepingComputer
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Nginx, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 18-Year-Old NGINX Rewrite Module Flaw Enables Unauthenticated RCE
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.2
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed multiple security vulnerabilities impacting NGINX Plus and NGINX Open, including a critical flaw that remained undetected for 18 years. The vulnerability, discovered by depthfirst, is a heap buffer overflow issue impacting ngx_http_rewrite_module (CVE-2026-42945, CVSS v4 score: 9.2) that could allow an attacker to achieve remote code execution or cause a
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/18-year-old-nginx-rewrite-module-flaw.html
 
🚨 PraisonAI CVE-2026-44338 Auth Bypass Targeted Within Hours of Disclosure
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 7.3
Resumo:
Threat actors have been observed attempting to exploit a recently disclosed security vulnerability in PraisonAI, an open-source multi-agent orchestration framework, within four hours of public disclosure. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-44338 (CVSS score: 7.3), a case of missing authentication that exposes sensitive endpoints to anyone, potentially allowing an attacker to invoke the
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/praisonai-cve-2026-44338-auth-bypass.html
 
🚨 New Fragnesia Linux Kernel LPE Grants Root Access via Page Cache Corruption
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
Details have emerged about a new variant of the recent Dirty Frag Linux local privilege escalation (LPE) vulnerability that allows local attackers to gain root access, making it the third such bug to be identified in the kernel within a span of two weeks. Codenamed Fragnesia, the security vulnerability is tracked as CVE-2026-46300 (CVSS score: 7.8) and is rooted in the Linux kernel's XFRM
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/new-fragnesia-linux-kernel-lpe-grants.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-42950 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 4.3
Resumo:
ELECOM wireless LAN access point devices do not check if language parameter has an appropriate value. If a user views a malicious page while logged in, the admin page on the user's web browser may become broken.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42950
 
💣 New critical Exim mailer flaw allows remote code execution
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A critical vulnerability affecting certain configurations of the Exim open-source mail transfer agent could be exploited by an unauthenticated remote attacker to execute arbitrary code.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/new-critical-exim-mailer-flaw-allows-remote-code-execution/
 
💣 18-year-old NGINX vulnerability allows DoS, potential RCE
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
An 18-year-old flaw in the NGINX open-source web server, discovered using an autonomous scanning system, can be exploited for denial of service and, under certain conditions, remote code execution.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/18-year-old-nginx-vulnerability-allows-dos-potential-rce/
 
💣 Windows BitLocker zero-day gives access to protected drives, PoC released
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A cybersecurity researcher has published proof-of-concept (PoC) exploits for two unpatched Microsoft Windows vulnerabilities named YellowKey and GreenPlasma, which are a BitLocker bypass and a privilege-escalation flaw.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/windows-bitlocker-zero-day-gives-access-to-protected-drives-poc-released/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-42141 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.7
Resumo:
Xibo is an open source digital signage platform with a web content management system and Windows display player software. Prior to 4.4.1, an authenticated Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in the Xibo CMS allows users with Library upload permissions to make arbitrary HTTP requests from the CMS server to internal or external network resources. This can be exploited to scan internal infrastructure, acces...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42141
 
🚨 CVE-2026-33110 - Office
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
Deserialization of untrusted data in Microsoft Office SharePoint allows an authorized attacker to execute code over a network.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33110
 
🚨 CVE-2026-32204 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
External control of file name or path in Azure Monitor Agent allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-32204
 
🚨 CVE-2026-1250 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
The Court Reservation – Manage Your Court Bookings Online plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to generic SQL Injection via the ‘id’ parameter in all versions up to, and including, 1.10.11 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to append additional SQL queries into already existing que...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-1250
 
🚨 CVE-2025-15463 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
The The Advanced Custom Fields: Extended plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary shortcode execution in all versions up to, and including, 0.9.2.3. This is due to the software allowing users to execute an action that does not properly validate a value before running do_shortcode. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary shortcodes.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-15463
 
📰 USN-8271-1: nginx vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that the nginx ngx_http_rewrite_module component incorrectly handled certain rewrite directives. A remote attacker could use this issue to cause nginx to crash, resulting in a denial of service, or possibly execute arbitrary code.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8271-1
 
📰 Microsoft issues emergency Windows server security patch - update now or risk attack - MSN
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia aborda atualização ou correção de segurança associada a Windows Server, o que pode exigir validação e aplicação no ambiente.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 12/05/2026 até 14/05/2026.
